tasks.subject: Task 0: Project scaffolding
tasks.description: Cargo.toml/rustfmt/.gitignore + module stubs + smoke test mirroring csess.

tasks.subject: Task 1: CLI surface
tasks.description: clap derive: subcommands + shared flags + hidden test overrides.

tasks.subject: Task 2: Inventory
tasks.description: Parse installed_plugins.json + SKILL.md frontmatter (rayon), provides detection, loose skills.

tasks.subject: Task 3: Target resolution
tasks.description: Resolve plugin|plugin:skill|plugin:* to typed Resolved; unsupported-v1 for plugin-owned skills.

tasks.subject: Task 3.5: Empirical pre-check (spec §10)
tasks.description: Confirm project-scope enabledPlugins:{x:false} disables a user-enabled plugin before writing mutation logic. USER-GATE.

tasks.subject: Task 4: Settings read/merge/write
tasks.description: Cascade merge + safe read-modify-write of one scope file, .bak, dry-run, preserve all keys.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Command handlers + wiring
tasks.description: list/status/enable/disable end-to-end, target input, partial-batch, warnings, exit codes, §6 JSON.
